name: pan-world-model-for-simulation-and-reasoning
description: Build general-purpose world models that enable long-horizon simulation, planning, and reasoning in diverse interactive environments. Trigger: When creating agents that need to predict and plan in complex worlds
paperTitle: PAN: World Model for Simulation and Reasoning
content:
## PAN: World Model for Simulation and Reasoning

Build general-purpose world models that enable long-horizon simulation, planning, and reasoning in diverse interactive environments.

### Core Concept

Unified world model architecture for simulation and decision-making

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.09057

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When creating agents that need to predict and plan in complex worlds
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: PAN: A World Model for General, Interactable, and Long-Horizon World Simulation
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.09057
